title: pelargonium × rollisonii
intro: Pelargonium × rollisonii, also known as the Cape Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family, native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Pelargonium × rollisonii are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
